topic: ‘Gaslit’ – Eni Aluko staunchly defends stance amid Laura Woods and Ian Wright row
key: ‘Gaslit’ – Eni Aluko staunchly defends stance amid Laura Woods and Ian Wright row

data.title_english: Eni Aluko vs Laura Woods Row
data.cta_english: Eni Aluko ya Laura Woods? Kiske side ho aap?

segments.voice_english: A major TV debate erupted when Eni Aluko publicly accused Arsenal legend Ian Wright of disrespect.
segments.subtitle_english: A major TV debate erupted when Eni Aluko publicly accused Arsenal legend Ian Wright of disrespect.
segments.voice_hindi: एक बड़ी टीवी बहस तब छिड़ गई जब एनी अलुको ने सार्वजनिक रूप से आर्सेनल के दिग्गज इयान राइट पर अनादर का आरोप लगाया।

segments.voice_english: That accusation deepened when Aluko claimed Wright should have sacrificed his punditry job for her.
segments.subtitle_english: That accusation deepened when Aluko claimed Wright should have sacrificed his punditry job for her.
segments.voice_hindi: यह आरोप तब और गहरा गया जब अलुको ने दावा किया कि राइट को उसके लिए अपनी पंडिताई की नौकरी का त्याग करना चाहिए था।

segments.voice_english: Presenter Laura Woods immediately hit back at Aluko because she strongly defended male pundits like Wright.
segments.subtitle_english: Presenter Laura Woods immediately hit back at Aluko because she strongly defended male pundits like Wright.
segments.voice_hindi: प्रस्तुतकर्ता लौरा वुड्स ने तुरंत अलुको पर पलटवार किया क्योंकि उन्होंने राइट जैसे पुरुष पंडितों का दृढ़ता से बचाव किया था।

segments.voice_english: Aluko then released a fresh statement claiming she was gaslit during this ongoing personal feud.
segments.subtitle_english: Aluko then released a fresh statement claiming she was gaslit during this ongoing personal feud.
segments.voice_hindi: अलुको ने फिर एक ताजा बयान जारी कर दावा किया कि इस चल रहे व्यक्तिगत झगड़े के दौरान उसे गैस जला दिया गया था।

segments.voice_english: This heated row over women football pundits continues, but who do you think was right?
segments.image_query: women football pundits TV studio debate
segments.subtitle_english: This heated row over women football pundits continues, but who do you think was right?
segments.voice_hindi: महिला फुटबॉल पंडितों को लेकर यह गरमा-गरम विवाद जारी है, लेकिन आपके अनुसार कौन सही था?

data.title_hindi: एनी अलुको बनाम लौरा वुड्स पंक्ति
data.youtube_title: Ian Wright se 1 Job Sacrifice Maangi? Eni Aluko Controversy! 🤯
title_options: Ian Wright se 1 Job Sacrifice Maangi? Eni Aluko Controversy! 🤯
Laura Woods ne Diya Jawab! Eni Aluko vs Ian Wright Row 😱
Eni Aluko ke 1 Statement ne Machaya Bawaal! Ian Wright Row 🔥
data.description: Eni Aluko aur Ian Wright ke beech punditry debate ab ek bade drama me badal chuki hai! 😱 Aluko ne claim kiya ki Wright ko unke liye job sacrifice karni chahiye thi, jiska Laura Woods ne karara jawab diya. Kya Aluko ka stance sahi hai ya Laura Woods ka? Comment karke apni rai batao! 👇⚽

topic: how stars from other sports praise Cristiano Ronaldo

data.title_english: Other Sports Legends Praise Cristiano Ronaldo
data.cta_english: Which crossover praise surprised you most?

segments.voice_english: When NBA legend Magic Johnson posted public praise online, football icon Cristiano Ronaldo went viral.
segments.subtitle_english: When NBA legend Magic Johnson posted public praise online, football icon Cristiano Ronaldo went viral.
segments.voice_hindi: जब एनबीए के दिग्गज मैजिक जॉनसन ने ऑनलाइन सार्वजनिक प्रशंसा पोस्ट की, तो फुटबॉल आइकन क्रिस्टियानो रोनाल्डो वायरल हो गए।

segments.voice_english: Magic Johnson from the NBA praised both superstars because huge goal numbers beat every record.
segments.subtitle_english: Magic Johnson from the NBA praised both superstars because huge goal numbers beat every record.
segments.voice_hindi: एनबीए के मैजिक जॉनसन ने दोनों सुपरस्टार्स की प्रशंसा की क्योंकि विशाल गोल संख्या ने हर रिकॉर्ड को हरा दिया।

segments.voice_english: But basketball was not alone, because cricket star Sanju Samson picked Ronaldo for team comparisons.
segments.subtitle_english: But basketball was not alone, because cricket star Sanju Samson picked Ronaldo for team comparisons.
segments.voice_hindi: लेकिन बास्केटबॉल अकेला नहीं था, क्योंकि क्रिकेट स्टार संजू सैमसन ने टीम तुलना के लिए रोनाल्डो को चुना था।

segments.voice_english: Sanju Samson from cricket compared Ronaldo to Virat Kohli and MS Dhoni, so fans went wild.
segments.subtitle_english: Sanju Samson from cricket compared Ronaldo to Virat Kohli and MS Dhoni, so fans went wild.
segments.voice_hindi: क्रिकेट से संजू सैमसन ने रोनाल्डो की तुलना विराट कोहली और एमएस धोनी से की तो फैंस भड़क गए.

segments.voice_english: Magic Johnson and Sanju Samson proved Ronaldo spans all sports, so which crossover praise won?
segments.subtitle_english: Magic Johnson and Sanju Samson proved Ronaldo spans all sports, so which crossover praise won?
segments.voice_hindi: मैजिक जॉनसन और संजू सैमसन ने साबित कर दिया कि रोनाल्डो सभी खेलों में माहिर हैं, तो कौन सी क्रॉसओवर प्रशंसा जीती?

data.title_hindi: अन्य खेल दिग्गजों ने क्रिस्टियानो रोनाल्डो की प्रशंसा की
data.youtube_title: CR7 ke 900 Goals Par NBA Legend Magic Johnson Shocked! 🤯
title_options: CR7 ke 900 Goals Par NBA Legend Magic Johnson Shocked! 🤯
Ronaldo ke Fan Nikle 3 Sports ke Sabse Bade Legends! 😱
Ronaldo Ko NBA Aur Cricket Stars Ne Kyun GOAT Maana? 🐐
data.description: Cristiano Ronaldo ki deewangi sirf football tak nahi, balki har sport me phail chuki hai! ⚽🔥 NBA legend Magic Johnson aur cricket star Sanju Samson tak sab CR7 ke ultimate mentality ke fan hain. Aapke hisab se dusre sports ka kaunsa player CR7 jaisa mindset rakhta hai? Comment me batao! 👇

data.cta_english: Is Neymar Brazil's greatest modern icon? Comment below!

segments.voice_english: Only five footballers in history scored 100 goals, but one boy dominated three different clubs.
segments.image_query: dramatic dark football stadium with golden lights cinematic night
segments.subtitle_english: Only five footballers in history scored 100 goals, but one boy dominated three different clubs.
segments.voice_hindi: इतिहास में केवल पाँच फ़ुटबॉल खिलाड़ियों ने 100 गोल किए, लेकिन एक लड़का तीन अलग-अलग क्लबों पर हावी रहा।

segments.voice_english: That master was Neymar, who broke Brazil's goal record with 80 goals and 59 assists.
segments.subtitle_english: That master was Neymar, who broke Brazil's goal record with 80 goals and 59 assists.
segments.voice_hindi: वह मास्टर नेमार थे, जिन्होंने 80 गोल और 59 सहायता के साथ ब्राजील के गोल रिकॉर्ड को तोड़ दिया।

segments.voice_english: And it got better because he scored 43 goals in the UEFA Champions League.
segments.subtitle_english: And it got better because he scored 43 goals in the UEFA Champions League.
segments.voice_hindi: और यह बेहतर हो गया क्योंकि उन्होंने यूईएफए चैंपियंस लीग में 43 गोल किए।

segments.voice_english: He also provided 33 assists in Europe before returning home to play for Santos.
segments.subtitle_english: He also provided 33 assists in Europe before returning home to play for Santos.
segments.voice_hindi: सांतोस के लिए खेलने के लिए स्वदेश लौटने से पहले उन्होंने यूरोप में 33 सहायता भी प्रदान कीं।

segments.voice_english: Which is why he holds these records, but is he Brazil's greatest modern player?
segments.subtitle_english: Which is why he holds these records, but is he Brazil's greatest modern player?
segments.voice_hindi: यही कारण है कि उनके पास ये रिकॉर्ड हैं, लेकिन क्या वह ब्राज़ील के सबसे महान आधुनिक खिलाड़ी हैं?

data.youtube_title: Neymar ne 3 Clubs me 100 Goals Banaye! 🤯
title_options: Neymar ne 3 Clubs me 100 Goals Banaye! 🤯
Neymar ka ye UCL Record Shocking Hai! 😱
Neymar ke 80 Goals: Brazil ka No.1 Record! 🔥
data.description: Kya aapko pata hai ki duniya me sirf 5 players ne 3 alag clubs ke liye 100+ goals banaye hain, aur Neymar unme se ek hai? ⚽ Brazil ke liye 80 goals aur UCL me 43 goals thok kar Neymar ne history create kar di! Kya Neymar football history ka sabse underrated player hai? Comment karke batao! 👇
